notes: 2D planar map for the current MVP; z stays 0 except for the under-bridge location at z=-1.
The western forest keeps the authored 10x10 layout.
The river is impassable except through the old bridge; the under-bridge path is separate from the bridge deck.
Forest is walled from north, south and west; the east opens into the widened dry luka.
The dry luka has north/south impassable caps and a central footpath wrap between its northern and southern edge.
The northern riverbank still wraps northward to the southern riverbank, with a reciprocal southward exit.
The bridge area has expanded riverbank cells and a z=-1 under-bridge location connected only to nearby riverbank locations, not to the bridge deck.
